short_blurb: Premium roofing for Pacific Palisades estates and hillside homes.
local_note: Pacific Palisades is a prestigious hillside community where ocean views, canyon terrain, and fire-zone proximity intersect. Nearly all properties above PCH are in fire hazard zones. We install Class A compliant systems on these homes and are experienced with the permitting process through the City of Los Angeles Department of Building and Safety for hillside properties. We treat every Palisades project with the level of care these exceptional homes deserve.

faqs.q: What roofing systems are available for my Pacific Palisades hillside home?
faqs.a: Class A concrete tile, metal roofing, and premium composition shingles are all excellent options depending on your home's architecture and HOA requirements. We'll present options with samples and pricing at your free estimate.
